name: GNU Go pattern code documentation
license: GNU documentation / project reference; used as engineering reference only
why: Documents pattern transformations, constraints, helpers, and pattern database architecture. GoMentor uses it to design original matcher behavior, not to copy pattern data.

name: GNU Go eyes and half-eyes documentation
license: GNU documentation / project reference; used as engineering reference only
why: Documents eye spaces, half-eyes, false-eye topology, and local-game framing. GoMentor uses it as a checklist for original life-and-death shape teaching.

name: Kombilo pattern search documentation
license: documentation reference; used as engineering reference only
why: Documents Go database pattern search with whole-board, corner, side, symmetry, and color-switch search behavior. GoMentor uses it to validate matcher feature coverage.
